mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.post_type, p.status, p.view_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.board_id, p.product_id, u.username, u.avatar_url, b.name AS board_name, pr.title AS product_title, ( SELECT image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = pr.id ORDER BY pi.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS product_image_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM forum_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.status = 'NORMAL' ) AS comment_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post(user_id, title, content, post_type, board_id, product_id, status, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{postType}, #{boardId}, #{productId}, 'NORMAL', 0, now(), now())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON p.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN product pr ON p.product_id = pr.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status = 'NORMAL'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_comment(post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, create_time) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, 'NORMAL', now())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON p.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN product pr ON p.product_id = pr.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, post_type = #{postType}, board_id = #{boardId}, product_id = #{productId}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'NORMAL'
UPDATE forum_post SET status = 'DELETED', update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM forum_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id ) AS like_count,
false
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM forum_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
AS liked_by_me FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM forum_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id ) AS like_count,
false
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM forum_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
AS liked_by_me FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND c.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 'NORMAL'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_comment_like(comment_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES(#{commentId}, #{userId}, now()) ON CONFLICT(comment_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
